dialog.title: Analytics Settings
dialog.description: Control anonymous analytics collection for AniTrend. We only store aggregated, non-identifying metrics.
dialog.label: Enable anonymous analytics
dialog.sublabel: Allow collection of anonymous, aggregated usage data.

consentBanner.message: AniTrend uses anonymous analytics to improve the product. By accepting you allow anonymous usage data to be collected. You can change this later in your browser settings.

contactForm.serverError: Failed to send message due to a server error.

handoff.pendingVerificationNote: This app handoff is still being verified against the native AniTrend route contract.

profileFallback.title: Couldn't open AniTrend
profileFallback.description: If the AniTrend app is installed, try opening your lists again. Otherwise you can stay here and continue on the web.
